text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Everyone was too strong... and too beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Everyone was too strong... and too beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... If I'm going to run on the same track as
the other runners, I have to get better....

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll be in the fray for first! I want to be
the closest to my oshis as they butt heads with
each other!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And in the last spurt, I wanna breathe in the air
they exhale! If only I could perform
photosynthesis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I don't... think I am disappointed. I feel
more like... ashamed...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I need to be strong enough that I don't embarrass
the other racers...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I want to be someone my oshis can
be proud of!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A true fan is inspired by their oshis to do better!
Everything for my oshis!
